font-size: 14px;">AdamW | encoder_lr=2e-5, head_lr=8e-5 | batch 16×accum 2 = eff.32<br>8 epochs | LR decay=0.90/layer | label_smoothing=0.03 | FP16<br>patience=3 | monitor = 0.7×bin_F1 + 0.3×abu_F1</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="440" x="360" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="I59oy9X-6oSon74qiluq-34" parent="1" data</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="270" x="40" y="550" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="I59oy9X-6oSon74qiluq-36" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontFamily=Arial;fontColor=#5B8DC9;align=left;" value="<font style="font-size: 13px;">■ Blue (#5B8DC9) — Processing steps</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="270" x="40" y="578" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="I59oy9X-6oSon74qiluq-37" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontFamily=Arial;fontColor=#7B5EA7;align=left;" value="<font style="font-size: 13px;">■ Purple (#7B5EA7) — Core model / en</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="270" x="40" y="605" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="I59oy9X-6oSon74qiluq-38" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontFamily=Arial;fontColor=#4CAF50;align=left;" value="<font style="font-size: 13px;">■ Green (#4CAF50) — Task heads / output</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="270" x="40" y="633" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="I59oy9X-6oSon74qiluq-39" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontFamily=Arial;fontColor=#E8913A;align=left;" value="<font style="font-size: 13px;">■ Orange (#E8913A) — Loss functions</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="270" x="40" y="660" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="I59oy9X-6oSon74qiluq-43" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontFamily=Arial;fontColor=#666666;fontStyle=2;align=center;shadow=1;glass=1;" value="<font style="font-size: 12px;">Figure D1. Proposed multi-task architecture. A shared transformer encoder feeds two task heads<br>(binary detection + 9-class abuse-type) via blended CLS+Mean pooling. All three encoders (BanglaBERT, MuRIL, XLM-R) share this architecture.</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="800" x="500" y="700" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.font:
Figure D1. Proposed multi-task architecture. A shared transformer encoder feeds two task heads
(binary detection + 9-class abuse-type) via blended CLS+Mean pooling. All three encoders (BanglaBERT, MuRIL, XLM-R) share this architecture.
